title: Midnight Saute American Water Chestnut Skillet
description: A resinous and silky American dish featuring water chestnut, perfect for midnight cravings, made with ayurvedic-tamasic-friendly ingredients and served on a hot stone plate.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until translucent, about 3 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute, until fragrant.
Add the sliced mushrooms and cook until they release their moisture and start to brown, about 5 minutes.
Add the sliced water chestnuts and cook for an additional 2 minutes, until they start to brown.
In a small bowl, whisk together the soy sauce, honey, salt, and pepper, and pour the mixture over the water chestnuts and mushrooms.
Stir everything together and cook for an additional 2 minutes, until the sauce has thickened.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Transfer the mixture to a hot stone plate and garnish with chopped fresh parsley.
